```{r k-and-r0-data-processing}
  dataset <- data.frame(lapply(dataset, trimws))
  dataset <- janitor::clean_names(dataset)
  
  # validation start
  validate(
    need(all(c("cluster_id", "transmission_relationship") %in% names(dataset)),
         "incorrect dataset: please upload k and r0 data containing 'cluster id' and 'transmission relationship'.")
  )
  # validation end
  
  dataset
})

# reactive dataset filtered by selected cluster
filtered_dataset_kr <- reactive({
  req(dataset_kr(), input$cluster_kr)
  dataset <- dataset_kr()
  
  # filter data based on selected cluster
  if (input$cluster_kr != "All") {
    dataset <- dataset %>% filter(cluster_id == input$cluster_kr)
  }
  
  dataset
})

# update cluster choices when data loads
observeEvent(dataset_kr(), {
  req(dataset_kr())
  clusters <- c("All", unique(dataset_kr()$cluster_id) %>% sort())
  updateSelectInput(session, "cluster_kr", choices = clusters, selected = "All")
})

# helper function for offspring distribution - uses filtered data
get_offspring_data <- function() {
  req(filtered_dataset_kr())
  dt <- filtered_dataset_kr()
  if (nrow(dt) == 0) stop("no data available for selected cluster")
  freqt <- table(dt$source_of_infection_id) %>% data.frame() %>% filter(Var1 != 'unknown')
  zeros <- nrow(dt) - nrow(freqt)
  offt <- table(freqt$Freq) %>% data.frame()
  offtk <- c(rep(0, zeros), rep(as.numeric(levels(offt$Var1)), offt$Freq))
  list(offtk = offtk, fit = fitdistr(offtk, "negative binomial"))
}

```

## Row {data-height="180"}

### Sample Size

```{r}

renderUI({
  # ensure filtered dataset is available
  req(filtered_dataset_kr())
  
  # data Preparation
  ss <- nrow(filtered_dataset_kr())
  
  # render the sample size text
  htmltools::div(
    style = "display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 100%; width: 100%; padding: 10px;",
    htmltools::div(
      style = "font-size: 30px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 10px; text-align: center;font-family: Tw Cen MT;",
      ss
    ),
    htmltools::div(
      style = "font-size: 14px; text-align: center; color: #666;",
      paste("Cluster:", input$cluster_kr)
    )
  )
})

```

### Model Parameters

```{r}

renderDT({
  req(input$file1_kr)
  
  res <- tryCatch({
    get_offspring_data()
  }, error = function(e) {
    NULL
  })
  
  if (is.null(res) || is.null(res$fit)) {
    df <- data.frame(
      parameter = c("R₀", "Kappa"),
      value = rep("No data available", 2),
      check.names = FALSE  
    )
  } else {
    fit_df <- as.data.frame(unlist(res$fit))
    fit_df$parameter <- row.names(fit_df)
    rownames(fit_df) <- NULL
    colnames(fit_df) <- c("value", "parameter")
    
    fit_df <- dplyr::select(fit_df, parameter, value) %>%
      mutate(
        parameter = gsub("size", "Kappa", parameter),
        parameter = gsub("mu", "R₀", parameter),
        value = round(value, 3)
      ) %>%
      head(4)
    
    df <- fit_df
  }
  
  datatable(
    df,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(
      dom = "Brt",
      buttons = list(
        list(extend = "csv", filename = paste0("k_ro_model_params_", input$cluster_kr, "_", Sys.Date())),
        list(extend = "excel", filename = paste0("k_ro_model_params_", input$cluster_kr, "_", Sys.Date())),
        list(extend = "pdf", filename = paste0("k_ro_model_params_", input$cluster_kr, "_", Sys.Date()))
      ),
      pageLength = nrow(df)
    ),
    extensions = "Buttons",
    class = "compact cell-border stripe"
  ) %>%
    formatStyle(
      columns = names(df),
      `font-size` = "14px"
    )
})

```

### Confidence Interval

```{r}

renderDT({
  req(input$file1_kr)
  res <- tryCatch({
    get_offspring_data()
  }, error = function(e) {
    NULL
  })
  
  if (is.null(res) || is.null(res$fit)) {
    df <- data.frame(
      parameter = c("R₀", "Kappa"),
      `2.5 %` = rep("No data available", 2),
      `97.5 %` = rep("No data available", 2),
      check.names = FALSE  
    )
  } else {
    conf_interval <- confint(res$fit, level = 0.95)
    conf_df <- as.data.frame(conf_interval)
    conf_df$parameter <- rownames(conf_df)
    
    conf_df <- dplyr::select(conf_df, parameter, `2.5 %`, `97.5 %`) %>%
      mutate(
        parameter = gsub("size", "Kappa", parameter),
        parameter = gsub("mu", "R₀", parameter),
        `2.5 %` = round(`2.5 %`, 3),
        `97.5 %` = round(`97.5 %`, 3)
      )
    
    df <- conf_df
  }
  
  datatable(
    df,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(
      dom = "Brt",
      buttons = list(
        list(extend = "csv", filename = paste0("k_ro_conf_int_", input$cluster_kr, "_", Sys.Date())),
        list(extend = "excel", filename = paste0("k_ro_conf_int_", input$cluster_kr, "_", Sys.Date())),
        list(extend = "pdf", filename = paste0("k_ro_conf_int_", input$cluster_kr, "_", Sys.Date()))
      ),
      pageLength = nrow(df)
    ),
    extensions = "Buttons",
    class = "compact cell-border stripe"
  ) %>%
    formatStyle(
      columns = names(df),
      `font-size` = "14px"
    )
})

```


Column {.tabset .tabset-fade }
-------------------------------

### Histogram

```{r}

renderHighchart({
  
  req(input$file1_kr)
  
  res <- tryCatch({
    get_offspring_data()
  }, error = function(e) {
    NULL
  })
  
  if (is.null(res)) {
    # create empty chart with message
    highchart() %>%
      hc_title(
        text = paste("Only one record available or No data available for cluster:", input$cluster_kr), 
        style = list(
          fontSize = "20px", 
          fontWeight = "bold", 
          color = "#000000", 
          fontFamily = "Tw Cen MT"
        )
      ) %>%
      hc_chart(style = list(fontFamily = "Tw Cen MT"), backgroundColor = "#FFFFFF")
  } else {
    # calculate negative binomial distribution
    xvalue <- 0:max(res$offtk)
    yvalue <- dnbinom(xvalue, size = res$fit$estimate["size"], mu = res$fit$estimate["mu"])
    
    # create histogram data
    hist_data <- hist(res$offtk, plot = FALSE, breaks = seq(-0.5, max(res$offtk) + 0.5, by = 1))
    
    # create data for columns
    hist_df <- data.frame(
      from = hist_data$breaks[-length(hist_data$breaks)],
      to = hist_data$breaks[-1],
      y = hist_data$density,
      x = hist_data$mids  # For positioning reference
    )
    
    # style definitions
    axis_style <- list(color = "#000000", fontSize = "14px", fontWeight = "bold")
    label_style <- list(color = "#000000", fontSize = "16px", fontWeight = "Normal")
    
    # create negative binomial curve data (nudged by -0.5)
    fit_data <- data.frame(x = xvalue - 0.5, y = yvalue)
    
    highchart() %>%
      # add histogram bars
      hc_add_series(
        data = list_parse(hist_df),
        type = "column",
        name = "Histogram",
        color = "#F2F2F2",
        backgroundColor = "#FFFFFF",
        borderColor = "#000000",
        borderWidth = 1,
        groupPadding = -0.05,
        pointPadding = 0.05,
        pointRange = 1,
        pointPlacement = 0
      ) %>%
      # add negative binomial curve
      hc_add_series(
        data = fit_data,
        type = "line",
        name = "Negative Binomial Fit",
        color = "#000000",
        lineWidth = 1,
        marker = list(enabled = FALSE)
      ) %>%
      hc_xAxis(
        title = list(text = "Offspring", style = axis_style),
        allowDecimals = FALSE,
        gridLineWidth = 0, 
        lineColor = "#000000", lineWidth = 1, tickWidth = 1, tickColor = "#000000",
        labels = list(style = label_style),
        min = -0.5,
        max = max(res$offtk) + 0.5,
        tickInterval = 1
      ) %>%
      hc_yAxis(
        title = list(text = "Density", style = axis_style),
        gridLineWidth = 0, 
        lineColor = "#000000", lineWidth = 1, tickWidth = 1, tickColor = "#000000",
        labels = list(style = label_style),
        allowDecimals = TRUE,
        min = 0
      ) %>%
      hc_title(
        text = paste("Cluster:", input$cluster_kr),
        style = list(fontSize = "16px", fontFamily = "Tw Cen MT", fontWeight = "bold")
      ) %>%
      hc_tooltip(
        shared = TRUE,
        crosshairs = TRUE,
        valueDecimals = 2,
        headerFormat = "<b>Offspring: {point.x}</b><br/>",
        pointFormat = "<span style='color:#000000'>Density</span>: <b>{point.y:.2f}</b><br/>"
      ) %>%
      hc_exporting(
        enabled = TRUE,
        filename = paste0("k_ro_", input$cluster_kr),
        buttons = list(
          contextButton = list(
            menuItems = list('downloadPNG', 'downloadPDF', 'downloadSVG')
          )
        )
      ) %>%
      hc_plotOptions(
        column = list(
          grouping = FALSE,
          pointRange = 1,
          pointPlacement = 0
        )
      ) %>%
      hc_legend(enabled = FALSE) %>%
      hc_chart(style = list(fontFamily = "Tw Cen MT"))
  }
})

```

### Transmission relationship

```{r transmission-relationship-output}
visNetworkOutput("network_plot")

```

```{r parse-network-data}

output$download_high_quality <- downloadHandler(
  filename = function() { paste("network_cluster_", input$cluster_kr, ".png", sep = "") },
  content = function(file) {
    temp_html <- tempfile(fileext = ".html")
    visSave(network_plot(), temp_html)
    webshot2::webshot(temp_html, file, vwidth = 3600, vheight = 2800, zoom = 6, delay = 3)
  }
)

# add a new download handler for PDF
output$download_high_quality_pdf <- downloadHandler(
  filename = function() { paste("network_cluster_", input$cluster_kr, ".pdf", sep = "") },
  content = function(file) {
    temp_html <- tempfile(fileext = ".html")
    visSave(network_plot(), temp_html)
    webshot2::webshot(temp_html, file, vwidth = 3600, vheight = 2800, delay = 3)
  }
)

filtered_data <- reactive({
  req(dataset_kr(), input$cluster_kr)
  df <- dataset_kr()
  
  # For transmission relationship, don't filter when "All" is selected
  # as we want to show specific cluster networks
  if (input$cluster_kr != "All") {
    df_filtered <- df %>% filter(cluster_id == input$cluster_kr)
  } else {
    # return empty data frame when "All" is selected
    df_filtered <- df[0, ]  # empty data frame with same structure
  }
  df_filtered
})

network_data <- reactive({
  req(filtered_data())
  df_filtered <- filtered_data()
  
  # Check if data is empty (when "All" is selected)
  if (nrow(df_filtered) == 0) {
    return(list(nodes = data.frame(), edges = data.frame()))
  }
  
  edges_level1_2 <- df_filtered %>%
    dplyr::select(cluster_id, infecteegen1) %>%
    unique() %>%
    rename(from = cluster_id, to = infecteegen1)
  
  edges_level2_3 <- df_filtered %>%
    dplyr::select(infecteegen1, infecteegen2) %>%
    unique() %>%
    rename(from = infecteegen1, to = infecteegen2)
  
  edges_level3_4 <- df_filtered %>%
    dplyr::select(infecteegen2, infecteegen3) %>%
    unique() %>%
    rename(from = infecteegen2, to = infecteegen3)
  
  edges_level4_5 <- df_filtered %>%
    dplyr::select(infecteegen3, infecteegen4) %>%
    unique() %>%
    rename(from = infecteegen3, to = infecteegen4)
  
  edge_list <- rbind(edges_level1_2, edges_level2_3, edges_level3_4, edges_level4_5) %>%
    filter(!from == "" & !to == "" & !is.na(from) & !is.na(to))
  
  all_nodes <- unique(c(edge_list$from, edge_list$to))
  
  node_clusters <- df_filtered %>%
    dplyr::select(id = cluster_id, cluster_id) %>%
    bind_rows(df_filtered %>% dplyr::select(id = infecteegen1, cluster_id)) %>%
    bind_rows(df_filtered %>% dplyr::select(id = infecteegen2, cluster_id)) %>%
    bind_rows(df_filtered %>% dplyr::select(id = infecteegen3, cluster_id)) %>%
    bind_rows(df_filtered %>% dplyr::select(id = infecteegen4, cluster_id)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(id), id != "") %>%
    distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE)
  
  nodes <- data.frame(
    id = all_nodes,
    label = all_nodes,
    title = paste("ID:", all_nodes, "<br>Cluster:", input$cluster_kr),
    color = "#4169E1",
    font = list(color = "white", face = "bold", size = 40),
    shadow = TRUE,
    size = 25
  ) %>%
    left_join(node_clusters, by = "id") %>%
    mutate(group = ifelse(is.na(cluster_id), "Unknown", as.character(cluster_id)))
  
  list(nodes = nodes, edges = edge_list)
})

output$network_plot <- renderVisNetwork({
  req(network_data())
  data <- network_data()
  nodes <- data$nodes
  edge_list <- data$edges
  
  # Check if "All" is selected or no data available
  if (input$cluster_kr == "All" || nrow(edge_list) == 0) {
    nodes <- data.frame(
      id = 1,
      label = "Please select an individual cluster.",
      title = "Transmission relationships are shown for individual clusters only.<br>Select a specific cluster from the dropdown or check the 'Transmission Networks' tab to see the full network.",
      color = "#f0f0f0",
      font = list(color = "black", size = 20, face = "normal")
    )
    return(
      visNetwork(nodes, data.frame(from = numeric(0), to = numeric(0))) %>%
        visOptions(manipulation = FALSE) %>%
        visNodes(shape = "box", size = 80) %>%
        visLayout(randomSeed = 123) %>%
        visPhysics(stabilization = FALSE) %>%
        visInteraction(dragNodes = FALSE, dragView = FALSE, zoomView = FALSE)
    )
  }
  
  visNetwork(nodes, edge_list) %>%
    visEdges(
      arrows = list(to = list(enabled = TRUE, scaleFactor = 1.2)),
      color = list(color = "#6E6E6E", highlight = "#FF0000"),
      smooth = list(enabled = TRUE, type = "dynamic")
    ) %>%
    visNodes(
      shape = "circle",
      size = 90,
      borderWidth = 1,
      borderWidthSelected = 4,
      font = list(size = 24, color = "white", face = "bold")
    ) %>%
    visOptions(
      highlightNearest = list(enabled = TRUE, degree = list(from = 5, to = 5), hover = TRUE, algorithm = "hierarchical"),
      nodesIdSelection = list(enabled = TRUE, values = nodes$id, selected = input$cluster_kr, style = 'width: 200px; height: 26px;')
    ) %>%
    visExport(
      type = "png",
      name = paste("transmission_network_cluster", input$cluster_kr),
      label = "Download as PNG",
      background = "#fff",
      style = "position: absolute; top: -400px; right: 10px; z-index: 10;",
      loadDependencies = TRUE
    ) %>%
    visInteraction(
      navigationButtons = TRUE,
      keyboard = TRUE,
      tooltipDelay = 0,
      dragView = TRUE,
      zoomView = TRUE
    ) %>%
    visLayout(
      randomSeed = 123,
      improvedLayout = TRUE
    ) %>%
    visPhysics(
      stabilization = list(iterations = 100),
      solver = "forceAtlas2Based",
      forceAtlas2Based = list(
        gravitationalConstant = -50,
        centralGravity = 0.01,
        springLength = 100,
        springConstant = 0.08
      )
    ) %>%
    visLegend(enabled = FALSE) %>%
    visEvents(
      selectNode = "function(nodes) { Shiny.setInputValue('selected_node', nodes); }"
    )
})

observeEvent(input$selected_node, {
  req(input$selected_node, dataset_kr())
  selected_id <- input$selected_node$nodes[[1]]
  df <- dataset_kr()
  selected_cluster <- df %>%
    filter(cluster_id == selected_id |
             infecteegen1 == selected_id |
             infecteegen2 == selected_id |
             infecteegen3 == selected_id |
             infecteegen4 == selected_id) %>%
    pull(cluster_id) %>%
    first()
  if(!is.na(selected_cluster) && selected_cluster != input$cluster_kr) {
    updateSelectInput(session, "cluster_kr", selected = selected_cluster)
  }
})

```

### Transmission Networks

```{r transmission-networks-output}
visNetworkOutput("full_network_plot")
```


```{r parse-transmission-chain}

# function to parse transmission chains
parse_transmission_chain <- function(relationship) {
  # skip if relationship is empty or unknown
  if (is.na(relationship) || relationship == "" || relationship == "unknown") {
    return(data.frame(from = character(), to = character()))
  }
  # split the chain by the arrow symbol (noticed this â†’ in the csv)
  chain <- strsplit(relationship, "→|â†’")[[1]]
  chain <- trimws(chain)  # added this cos some rows have whitespace
  
  # extract immediate relationships (each consecutive pair)
  if (length(chain) >= 2) {
    edges <- data.frame(
      from = chain[1:(length(chain) - 1)],
      to = chain[2:length(chain)]
    )
    return(edges[edges$from != "" & edges$to != "" & edges$from != edges$to, ])
  }
  
  return(data.frame(from = character(), to = character()))
}

output$download_full_network <- downloadHandler(
  filename = function() { paste("full_transmission_network_", Sys.Date(), ".png", sep = "") },
  content = function(file) {
    temp_html <- tempfile(fileext = ".html")
    visSave(full_network_plot(), temp_html)
    webshot2::webshot(temp_html, file, vwidth = 3600, vheight = 2800, zoom = 6, delay = 3)
  }
)

full_network_data <- reactive({
  req(dataset_kr())
  df <- dataset_kr()
  
  edges_list <- lapply(df$transmission_relationship, parse_transmission_chain)
  edges <- do.call(rbind, edges_list)
  
  edges <- edges[complete.cases(edges), ]
  edges <- unique(edges)
  
  # get all unique nodes and sort them numerically
  all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))
  
  # extract numeric values for sorting
  node_numbers <- as.numeric(gsub("#", "", all_nodes))
  sorted_nodes <- all_nodes[order(node_numbers)]
  
  # create nodes data frame
  nodes <- data.frame(
    id = sorted_nodes,
    label = sorted_nodes,
    title = paste("ID:", sorted_nodes),
    color = "#4169E1",
    font = list(color = "white", face = "bold", size = 50),
    shadow = TRUE,
    size = 30
  )
  
  list(nodes = nodes, edges = edges, sorted_ids = sorted_nodes)
})

output$full_network_plot <- renderVisNetwork({
  req(full_network_data())
  data <- full_network_data()
  nodes <- data$nodes
  edges <- data$edges
  sorted_ids <- data$sorted_ids
  
  if(nrow(edges) == 0) {
    nodes <- data.frame(
      id = 1,
      label = "No transmission data",
      title = "No transmission relationships found in the dataset",
      color = "#f0f0f0",
      font = list(color = "black", size = 24)
    )
    return(
      visNetwork(nodes, data.frame(from = numeric(0), to = numeric(0))) %>%
        visOptions(manipulation = FALSE) %>%
        visNodes(shape = "box", size = 50) %>%
        visLayout(randomSeed = 123)
    )
  }
  
  visNetwork(nodes, edges) %>%
    visEdges(
      arrows = list(to = list(enabled = TRUE, scaleFactor = 1.2)),
      color = list(color = "#6E6E6E", highlight = "#FF0000"),
      smooth = list(enabled = TRUE, type = "dynamic")
    ) %>%
    visNodes(
      shape = "circle",
      size = 30,
      borderWidth = 1,
      borderWidthSelected = 4,
      font = list(size = 20, color = "white", face = "bold")
    ) %>%
    visOptions(
      highlightNearest = list(enabled = TRUE, degree = 1, hover = TRUE),
      nodesIdSelection = list(
        enabled = TRUE, 
        values = sorted_ids,
        style = 'width: 200px; height: 26px;'
      )
    ) %>%
    visExport(
      type = "png",
      name = paste("full_transmission_network_", Sys.Date()),
      label = "Download as PNG",
      background = "#fff",
      style = "position: absolute; top: -400px; right: 10px;",
      loadDependencies = TRUE
    ) %>%
    visInteraction(
      navigationButtons = TRUE,
      keyboard = TRUE,
      tooltipDelay = 0,
      dragView = TRUE,
      zoomView = TRUE
    ) %>%
    visLayout(
      randomSeed = 123,
      improvedLayout = TRUE
    ) %>%
    visPhysics(
      stabilization = list(iterations = 100),
      solver = "forceAtlas2Based",
      forceAtlas2Based = list(
        gravitationalConstant = -50,
        centralGravity = 0.01,
        springLength = 100,
        springConstant = 0.08
      )
    ) %>%
    visLegend(enabled = FALSE)
})

```

### Dataset Preview

```{r kappa-r0-dataset-preview}
renderDataTable({
  filtered_dataset_kr()
}, options = list(pageLength = 10), rownames = FALSE)

```
